evals.name: basic-publish
evals.prompt: Publish the file test_articles/test.md to my WeChat Official Account as a draft.
evals.expected_output: The Agent should detect credentials, select a style (or ask), and execute the publisher script to create a draft, providing the media_id in the response.

evals.name: style-selection-publish
evals.prompt: I have a technical tutorial in test_articles/test_features.md. I want to publish it to WeChat with a 'Terminal' hacker style.
evals.expected_output: The Agent should correctly map 'Terminal' to the --style terminal parameter and execute the publisher.

evals.name: auto-cover-publish
evals.prompt: Publish test_articles/test.md to WeChat. I don't have a cover image, please handle it for me.
evals.expected_output: The Agent should use generate_cover.py to create a cover before calling the publisher.
